title: Epic Fight x True Ending Compatibility
description: Fixes Ender Dragon invulnerability issues when Epic Fight and True Ending are used together.
body:
This mod fixes a critical compatibility issue between Epic Fight and True Ending on Minecraft Forge 1.20.1.

When both mods are installed, the Ender Dragon can become permanently invulnerable during the final phase, because Epic Fight prevents the dragon from landing on the exit portal as expected by True Ending. This results in the dragon being impossible to kill in survival mode.

This compatibility mod forcefully removes the Ender Dragon's invulnerability state on the server, ensuring the fight can always be completed normally.

✔ Works with existing worlds

✔ Server-side only

✔ No configuration required

✔ Designed specifically for Epic Fight + True Ending on Forge 1.20.1

This mod does not change dragon behavior, AI, or animations — it only prevents the softlock.
